title: Preset
description: A preset definition for OSM feature types. Compatible with id-tagging-schema preset format.

tags.description: OSM tags that define this preset. Value of '*' matches any value.

addTags.description: Additional tags to add when applying this preset (superset of 'tags').

removeTags.description: Tags to remove when switching away from this preset.

fields.description: Field IDs shown in the primary editor section.

moreFields.description: Field IDs available in the 'more fields' section.

geometry.description: Geometry types this preset applies to.

matchScore.description: Priority for matching (higher wins). Default is 1.0.

searchable.description: Whether this preset appears in search results.

suggestion.description: Whether this is a name-suggestion-index preset.

imageURL.description: URL to an image for this preset.

replacement.description: Preset ID to suggest as a replacement (for deprecated presets).

locationSet.description: LocationSet defining where this preset is relevant.
